title: Oscar Predictions: Film Editing — Will This Match Up With the Sound Category?
text: Variety's Awards Circuit section published Oscar predictions for Best Film Editing. The predictions commentary was last updated on March 2, 2026. Final Oscar voting was underway from February 26 to March 5, 2026, with the 98th Academy Awards ceremony scheduled for March 15, 2026, hosted by Conan O'Brien on ABC. Marty Supreme (distributed by A24) was among the films under consideration in this category. The article indicates that predictions would be updated regularly throughout the awards season.
